charismatic_unlocks.title: A damselfly hovers over the pond.
charismatic_unlocks.detail: Four clear wings, eyes like beads, and a path that zigzags above the water.

charismatic_unlocks.title: A butterfly drifts through the meadow.
charismatic_unlocks.detail: Soft wings open and close, resting on a flower, then lifting again on the breeze.

charismatic_unlocks.title: A bullfrog rests at the pond's edge.
charismatic_unlocks.detail: Green skin, gold eyes just above the water, a low call that carries across the pond.

charismatic_unlocks.title: A red-tailed hawk circles overhead.
charismatic_unlocks.detail: Broad wings open wide, a rusty tail catching the light as it rides a slow spiral.

charismatic_unlocks.title: A red fox steps between the trees.
charismatic_unlocks.detail: Rust-orange coat, white-tipped tail, quiet paws moving through fallen leaves.

charismatic_unlocks.title: A deer pauses in the woodland.
charismatic_unlocks.detail: Long ears turn, a white tail flicks, then it steps quietly back into the trees.

charismatic_unlocks.title: A raccoon ambles along the alley.
charismatic_unlocks.detail: A masked face, a striped tail, careful hands turning over leaves and small things at night.

charismatic_unlocks.title: A hummingbird hovers at a flower.
charismatic_unlocks.detail: Tiny wings blur, the throat flashes red, and it darts to the next bloom.

charismatic_unlocks.title: A monarch visits your meadow.
charismatic_unlocks.detail: Orange wings edged in black, gentle as a leaf, drifting from milkweed to milkweed.

charismatic_unlocks.title: A red-capped mushroom rises from the soil.
charismatic_unlocks.detail: A bright red cap with white flecks, pushing up through the moss after rain.
